text.title: Web Scraping Pagination Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a walk by pattern detection and cap check. Branches name observable DOM/report features; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: pool/limiter ready, stop selector present, dedupe key defined?

branch.question: Which pagination pattern does the DOM exhibit (next-button, infinite-scroll, load-more)?
Is concurrency_cap set AND ≤ 10 AND pool_high_water_mark ≤ concurrency_cap?
Is duplicate_count meaningful (any value for next-button; >0 for infinite-scroll / load-more with >50 items)?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → pattern=infinite-scroll matches walker → cap=3, hwm=3 → duplicate_count=18 on 240 items → verdict=approve (ref run-the-checklist).
